subcodes.first_line: O thou who art engaged in the service of the Cause of God! A hundred thousand thanks must be rendered that thy household hath been aided and confirmed in the service of His Cause and that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشغول بخدمت امر الله صد هزار شکر باید نمود که آن خانمان بخدمت امر موید و آن
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @poems and quotation from poetry, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
